title: Canada's PM Carney Recommends 5 'Nation-Building Projects' for Approval, Including LNG Expansion
content: LNG Canada Phase 2, Kitimat, British Coumbia - This project will double LNG Canadaâ€™s production of liquefied natural gas, making it the second-largest facility of its kind in the world. It is expected to attract significant private-sector capital to Canada, contribute to our GDP growth, and support jobs and economic growth in local communities. It will diversify our trading partners and meet increasing global demand for secure, low-carbon energy with Canadian LNG, contributing to worldwide energy security by increasing the supply of available natural gas for Asian and European partners.Â
author: Analysts Account
